excerpt: The official programme page for MSc in Facility Management lists Early round opening on 2026-07-02 and closing on 2026-10-20. Source: https://www.polyu.edu.hk/study/pg/tpg/2027/33085-fam-fmm Local Application Deadline: 20 Oct 2026 (Early Round) Non-Local Application Deadline: 20 Oct 2026 (Early Round)
matchedTextBefore: There is a provision for a Postgraduate Diploma (PgD) exit award.
